data.body: Pass-1 llm-prompts overlay: flagged UI-artifact leakage in src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-tests.md — the diff inserts conversational preamble ("Sure! Here's the improved prompt for you:") and an opening ```markdown code fence into the prompt body just after the front-matter close. These are paste artifacts in a programmatically-consumed prompt file. Recorded as an evidence finding.
